transcript: Speaker A: Madam, en madtidira? [Madam, what are you doing?] Speaker B: I am buying all groceries. Idaralli 'all' serisodu bekagilla, just 'I am buying groceries' anta helbeku. [No need to add 'all' in this, just say 'I am buying groceries'.] Speaker A: Oh... okay okay. Cart nalli enide madam? [Oh... okay okay. What is in the cart, madam?] Speaker B: Biscuit, shampoo, noodles and many items. Almost correct, 'many items' badalu 'many things' anta helidre natural agirutte. 'I have biscuits, shampoo, noodles and many things' anta helbeku. [Almost correct, instead of 'many items' if you say 'many things' it will be natural. You should say 'I have biscuits, shampoo, noodles and many things'.] Speaker A: Nanige English matnadoke bhaya agutte. [I am afraid of speaking English.] Speaker B: Adakkagiye MySivi ide. Illi AI jote anytime practice madbodu. Judge madoru yaru iralla. [That's why MySivi is there. Here you can practice with AI anytime. There will be no one to judge you.] Speaker A: Adre spoken English classes tumba costly alva? [But spoken English classes are very costly, right?] Speaker B: Illa madam, normal spoken English classes ginta 7x cheaper. Just 1 rupee inda shuru madbodu. Adakkagiye 1 crore jana MySivi nalli daily practice madtidare. [No madam, 7x cheaper than normal spoken English classes. You can start with just 1 rupee. That's why 1 crore people are practicing daily on MySivi.] Speaker A: Adre nanige time sigodilla. [But I don't get time.] Speaker B: Dinakke just 15 minutes saku. Swalpa swalpa confidence build agutte, English automatic improve agutte. [Just 15 minutes a day is enough. Slowly confidence will build, English will automatically improve.] Speaker A: Wow, hege start madoadu? [Wow, how to start?] Speaker B: Kelagina install button press madi, MySivi app install madi, sign up madi, AI jote practice start madi. [Press the install button below, install the MySivi app, sign up, and start practicing with AI.]
on_screen_text: Madam ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ [Madam, what are you doing?] I am buying all groceries. Cartನಲ್ಲಿ ಏನಿದೆ ಮೇಡಂ [What is in the cart, madam?] Biscuit, shampoo, noodles and many items. "Many items" ಬದಲು "many things" [Instead of "Many items", "many things"]. "I have biscuits, shampoo, noodles and many things". ನನಗೆ English ಮಾತನಾಡೋಕೆ ಭಯ [I am afraid of speaking English]. Spoken English classes ತುಂಬಾ costly ಅಲ್ವಾ [Spoken English classes are very costly, right?]. Spoken English classesಗಿಂತ 7x Cheaper [7x Cheaper than Spoken English classes]. Just ₹1ರಿಂದ [Just from ₹1]. ಆದರೆ ನನಗೆ time ಸಿಗೋದಿಲ್ಲ [But I don't get time]. Wow ಹೇಗೆ start ಮಾಡೋದು [Wow, how to start?]. MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: A woman shopping in a supermarket is corrected on her English grammar by an AI robot. The robot introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, non-judgmental way to practice English for 15 minutes a day. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
